ddt:Target.Name: canv_T4_enva16_5_19_05_2017
ddt:Target.Description:
Messagerie CAN / CAN database: ALL_MESSAGE_LIST_T4ENV-A.16.5_OFFICIAL_19_05_2017_CAN-V
Importé le / Import date: 2017-11-09 12:22:06

Item.Text: no Crash Detection Out Of Order
Driver safety belt reminder : No Warning
Driver safety belt reminder Warning level 1
Driver safety belt reminder Warning level 2
Passenger safety belt reminder : no warning
Passenger safety belt reminder Warning level 1
Passenger safety belt reminder Warning level 2
CVT don't request the HSA release delay
CVT request the HSA release delay
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked
Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
All faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
All faults reports and alerts are enabled
Vehicle not locked from the outside by the customer
Vehicle Locked from the outside by the customer
No neutral switch failure display request
Clutch pedal not pressed at maximum
No PTC engine Idle speed increase request
PTC engine Idle speed increase request
No PTC thermal Regulator Freeze requested
Auto Start not in restart failure
Customer Auto Start Will is True
Customer Auto Start Will is False
Mastervac Pressure Sensor is open circuit or short to GND
Mastervac Pressure Sensor is short to power supply circuit diagnosis NG
Mastervac Pressure Sensor is plausibility check diagnosis or power supply voltage
Customer not Authorized - ESCL shall not be unlocked
Customer Authorized - ESCL can be unlocked
low speed engine fan speed request
Mid speed engine fan speed request (Nissan fan)
high speed engine fan speed request
No request for PTC number thermal request
Diag result : AIRBAG Malfunction lamp OFF
Diag result : AIRBAG Malfunction lamp ON
SERV and STOP are ON (alert type R3& D3)
Day time according light level sensor and no light request from driver
Night time according to light level sensor or light requested by driver
No engine stop request (initial stop or independant engine running)
No mechanical load requested by ECM
S&S is unavailable for failure 1 - technical restart in automatic stop
S&S is unavailable for failure 2 - no technical restart in automatic stop
CAN communication fault from USM is detected in ECM
CAN communication fault from USM is confirmed in ECM
No position lights omission warning resquested
Primary ignition supply relay control OFF
Primary ignition supply relay control ON
front fog lights display not requested
Engine stop auto warn not activated
Day time according light level sensor
Night time according to light level sensor
VehicleSpeed not OK for HFP operation
position OK (compliant with the theoritical position processed from calculations)
undefined position (not compliant with the theoritical position processed from calculations)
vehicle speed > 0 km/h or frame absent or vehicle speed = FFFFh
data received in BCM frame consistent
data received in BCM frame not consistent
frame BCM_to_ESCL3 has been missing for 1 second
operating voltage out of range (U<9V or U>16V)
timing of sensor test is correct
No card present in the card reader
Card present in the card reader
Primary ignition supply relay control OFF
Primary ignition supply relay control ON
Push to Start button is pressed
Push brake pedal requested (Shiftlock for Automatic gear or cranking with transmission range engaged for robotized gear)

left flashing indicator ON and right flashing indicator ON

No front right door open warning

CC ON and ( awaiting or suspended)
